name: turjuman
description: Open-source, self-hosted translation management platform managed primarily through an MCP server connected to an LLM/agent.

scripts.test:integration: AWS_ENDPOINT_URL_DYNAMODB=http://localhost:4566 AWS_REGION=us-east-1 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=test AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=test TURJUMAN_TABLE=TurjumanIntegration pnpm --filter @turjuman/core --filter @turjuman/api run test
scripts.localstack:up: docker compose up -d localstack && node scripts/wait-for-localstack.mjs
scripts.e2e:inprocess: TURJUMAN_E2E_MODE=inprocess AWS_ENDPOINT_URL_DYNAMODB=http://localhost:4566 AWS_REGION=us-east-1 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=test AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=test TURJUMAN_TABLE=TurjumanInprocessE2E pnpm --filter @turjuman/e2e run test
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run localstack:up && pnpm run e2e:deploy && pnpm run e2e:test; code=$?; pnpm run localstack:down; exit $code
